docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $11,266.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

***PETITION FILED BY PROMETHEUS DORSEY ON MAY-29-2013 ON CONSOLIDATED CASE CPF-13-022796 IS STRICKEN DUE TO NON-PAYMENT OF COURT FEES, UPON THE DENIAL OF HIS APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. (206)

MINI MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS CONTINUED FROM SEP-17-2014 TO NOV-19-2014, AT 9:00 AM, IN DEPT. 302, PER CLAIMANT'S REQUEST. MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-19-2014 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 302

DISCOVERY, 302, MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF DEMAND FOR PRODUCTION AND INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; PETITIONER'S FIRST SET OF SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES; JUDICIAL COUNCIL FORM INTERROGATORIES IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR; MOTION VACATED BY STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES. ORDER - STIPULATION AND ORDER FOR MOTION TO BE HEARD BY A MEMBER OF THE CALIFORNIA BAR SERVING AS A TEMPORARY JUDGE
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA DORSEY, PROMETHEUS

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $2,000.00 U.S. CURRENCY BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT PROMETHEUS DORSEY. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $9,266.00 U.S. CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. ANY STIPULATIONS WHICH STAYED THIS FORFEITURE PROCEEDING IS RELEASED. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
